mnemonics: FATEPIG: Fairness, Accountability, Transparency, Explainability, Privacy, Inclusivity, Governance
PUBLIC AI: Policies Underpin Beneficial, Lawful, Intelligent, and Conscientious Artificial Intelligence
Think of policy as the guardrails (F.A.T.E. - Fairness, Accountability, Transparency, Explainability) on the highway of AI development.
keyPoints: Ethical principles must be translated into enforceable policy to have real-world impact.
A key challenge is balancing innovation and progress with ethical safeguards and public safety.
Policy must be adaptable and international to keep pace with rapidly evolving AI technology.
commonMistakes: Assuming ethical guidelines are self-enforcing without the need for public policy and legal consequences.
Designing policy in a technological vacuum without expert input from engineers and ethicists.
Focusing solely on national policy when AI development and data flow are inherently global issues.
